curated.blurb: A small Aptos breeder on Freedom Boulevard raising rare and heritage chickens for temperament, egg color, and breed standard. Current offerings include coop-ready pullets and young chicks, recently Black Star, Welsummer, Opal Legbar, Olive Egger, Wheaten Marans, White Crested Blue Polish, Buff Orpington, and Sapphire Gems, plus fertile hatching eggs. By appointment; chicks from $25.

A humane Sebastopol hatchery known for rare and colorful egg layers. Chicks are available now across many lines, including French Copper Marans, Ameraucana, Olive and Azure Eggers, German Bielefelder, Heritage Welsummer, Serama, and Silkie, generally $10 to $50. Fertile hatching eggs and farm pickup available, and they ship within California.
Delivers guaranteed-hen pullets, close to laying age, on regular Central Coast routes. A low-fuss option if you would rather skip the brooder stage.
